christmasSale.name: HP LASERJET PRO 4003DW
christmasSale.description: The monochrome laser printer operates at high speed, which makes it suitable for workgroups and offices that need to print black-and-white documents quickly while providing automatic double-sided printing and multiple wired and wireless connection options for their document processing needs.
christmasSale.fullDescription:
• Print Technology: Monochrome laser printing (sharp black‑and‑white output with high text quality)
• Print Speed: Up to 40 ppm (A4) fast printing for busy office environments.
• Print Resolution: Up to 1200 × 1200 dpi, clear and crisp text/graphics.
• Duplex Printing: Automatic two‑sided printing
• Memory & Processor: 256 MB memory, 1.2 GHz processor
• Monthly Duty Cycle: Up to 80,000 pages (recommended 750–4,000 pages/month).
• Connectivity: USB 2.0, Gigabit Ethernet, dual‑band Wi‑Fi (2.4 / 5 GHz), Wi‑Fi Direct.
• Mobile Printing: Supports HP Smart App, Apple AirPrint™, Mopria™
• Paper Handling: 250‑sheet input tray + 100‑sheet multipurpose tray, 150‑sheet output capacity, Optional extra tray support (up to 900 sheets total)
• Supported Media: A4, A5, A6, envelopes, labels, postcards, and various paper types.
• Display: 2‑line backlit LCD for status/menus.
• Size & Weight: Approx. 381 × 357 × 216 mm, 8.56 kg
• Best for: Offices and workgroups needing fast monochrome printing, automatic duplexing, and flexible connectivity with strong duty cycle support.

christmasSale.name: HP PRINTER DESKJET 2320
christmasSale.description: A compact and affordable all‑in‑one printer that lets you print, scan, and copy everyday documents and photos. The product operates effectively as a home solution which provides users with simple USB installation.
christmasSale.fullDescription:
• Functions: Print, Scan, Copy
• Print Technology: HP Thermal Inkjet.
• Print Speed: Up to 7.5 ppm (black) and 5.5 ppm (color) ISO; draft speeds up to 20 ppm black / 16 ppm color.
• Print Resolution: Up to 1200 × 1200 dpi (black) and 4800 × 1200 optimized dpi (color).
• Scanner: Flatbed scanner up to 1200 dpi optical resolution.
• Copy Speed: Up to 6 cpm (black) and 3 cpm (color).
• Copy Quality: Up to 600 × 300 dpi (black & color).
• Connectivity: Hi‑Speed USB 2.0 (no wireless).
• Duplex Printing: Manual (driver‑supported only).
• Paper Handling: Input Tray: 60 sheets, Output Tray: 25 sheets, 
• Supported Sizes: A4, B5, A6, DL envelope.
• Monthly Duty Cycle: Up to 1,000 pages; recommended monthly volume 50–100 pages.
• Cartridge Configuration: 2 cartridges (black + tri‑color)
• Compatible OS: Windows (7, 10, 11) and macOS (10.12 and above).
• Dimensions: 425.2 × 304.1 × 149.1 mm
• Weight: 3.42 kg (printer).
• Best for: Everyday browsing, social media use, video streaming, messaging, and long battery endurance.
